improvements.proposal: Require explicit handling for idempotent duplicate writes by stating whether blob_write_succeeded must appear on every run or only on new blob creation.
improvements.rationale: Avoids ambiguity between blob_write_succeeded and blob_write_skipped_exists behavior.

improvements.proposal: Instruct implementation to add assertions for every required structured-log field in acceptance criteria (not only event presence).
improvements.rationale: Prevents gaps where events exist but required fields are unverified.

improvements.proposal: Add explicit guidance to safely parse telemetry fields from external responses with malformed/null fallback behavior and corresponding tests.
improvements.rationale: Improves resiliency when upstream APIs return unexpected types.
